CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sydney Elise Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, MATRIC RESOURCES, INC.,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VISUAL NETWORK.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declarations filed in support of Request for Entry of Default Judgment admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $5,690.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $7,451.67
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $14,551.67
Judgment signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Sydney Fairbairn, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Nov-19-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. ***NOTE: The continued hearing date of Nov-12-2013 given at the hearing was in error. There will be no hearings on Nov-12-2013 in Department 610.*** Proceedings not reported. (610)
